scripts.build: rm -rf dist && esbuild index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node22 --external:openclaw/plugin-sdk --outfile=dist/index.cjs && esbuild src/config.ts src/service.ts src/otel-bootstrap.ts src/session-store.ts src/service-utils.ts src/tool-span-manager.ts src/diagnostic-event-handler.ts --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --outdir=dist --outbase=. && mkdir -p dist/src && cp src/trace-runtime.js dist/src/trace-runtime.js
